testcase.name: Search for Selenium TestNG

failure.message: Page title 'https://www.google.com/search?q=Selenium+TestNG&sca_esv=8c852ac327c5c672&source=hp&ei=rjrvaaXQAc2jur8P99m3-AQ&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAae9Ivk3qcuWScLGI-4FIqwSuJzax5TyL&sei=rjrvaZ7FJP-rur8P07nR6Qs' should contain 'Selenium TestNG' expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Page title 'https://www.google.com/search?q=Selenium+TestNG&sca_esv=8c852ac327c5c672&source=hp&ei=rjrvaaXQAc2jur8P99m3-AQ&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAae9Ivk3qcuWScLGI-4FIqwSuJzax5TyL&sei=rjrvaZ7FJP-rur8P07nR6Qs' should contain 'Selenium TestNG' expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepDefinitions.GoogleSearchSteps.thePageTitleShouldContain(GoogleSearchSteps.java:46) at ✽.the page title should contain "Selenium TestNG"(file:///home/runner/work/Selenium-setup/Selenium-setup/src/test/resources/features/GoogleSearch.feature:9)
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Google homepage...........................................passed When I search for "Selenium TestNG".........................................passed Then I should see search results............................................passed And the page title should contain "Selenium TestNG".........................failed

testcase.name: Search with different terms - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Google homepage...........................................passed When I search for "Selenium"................................................passed Then I should see search results............................................passed And the page title should contain "Selenium"................................passed

testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Google homepage...........................................passed When I search for "TestNG"..................................................passed Then I should see search results............................................passed And the page title should contain "TestNG"..................................passed

testcase.name: Search with different terms - Example #1.3
